content: RBAC in logistics/procurement MIS: three standard roles for SME — Warehouse Staff (record stock-in/out, view stock levels, receive against POs), Procurement/Admin (create suppliers, create and manage POs, manage product master), Manager (full read access, reports, dashboard, approve POs). Core principle: least privilege per role. For SME MVP two-role model (Staff vs Manager/Admin) is sufficient; three roles map cleanly to actual job functions in B2B distribution.
